title: PickPoint One
about: Robotic picking arm for small-parts fulfillment zones. Mounts on standard racking and commissions in one week; servo actuators supplied by Voltaic Components.

title: PickPoint One HD
about: Heavy-duty variant of the PickPoint One picking arm with a reinforced wrist assembly for items up to 12 kg. Uses the same Voltaic Components VX-9 actuators as the standard unit.

title: PickPoint One Spares Kit
about: On-site spares kit for PickPoint One: gripper assembly, wrist encoder, and a spare VX-9 servo actuator. Sized so a customer maintenance crew can clear common faults without a service visit.

title: FleetView Team
about: FleetView monitoring subscription for fleets up to 25 arms. Real-time pick rates, fault trends, and per-arm utilization dashboards for shift leads.

title: FleetView Site
about: FleetView monitoring subscription for a full building of up to 200 arms, including alerting integrations and an API for warehouse-management systems.

title: Commissioning Week
about: One week of on-site commissioning by a Meridian Robotics engineer, including service training for the customer's maintenance crew. Included with every first PickPoint One deployment.
